description_long: This object is a medium-sized pumpkin with a classic orange exterior and a short, greenish stem on top. The pumpkin features a carved face with triangular eyes and a jagged, zigzag mouth, illuminated from within, giving it the appearance of a traditional jack-o'-lantern. The surface of the pumpkin is slightly faceted, with visible subtle texture lines and a matte finish. The stem is thick and tapers upward, showing a slight bend. The carved facial features are only visible from certain angles, while the rest of the pumpkin remains uncarved and smooth. There are no additional decorative accessories or embellishments present.
description: A medium orange pumpkin with a green stem and a carved, glowing jack-o'-lantern face featuring triangular eyes and a zigzag mouth.
description_view_0: The pumpkin is shown with its carved face visible, displaying triangular eyes and a jagged mouth, with the stem angled to the right.
description_view_1: The pumpkin is viewed from above, showing the top of the stem and the smooth, uncarved surface with no facial features visible.
description_view_2: The pumpkin is seen from the back, revealing a smooth, uncarved orange surface and the stem leaning to the left.
description_view_3: The pumpkin is shown from a side angle, partially revealing one triangular eye and the zigzag mouth, with the stem pointing upward.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern style with two triangular eyes and a wide, zigzag mouth cutout. The pattern is simple and geometric, with no additional motifs or etchings.
